metadata.title: EasyGoVibeCoding | Enterprise AI Coding Tools and Architecture Training Platform
metadata.description: AI coding tools are not magic; they are engineering. Only by understanding the mechanisms can you master the tools. An enterprise AI coding tools and architecture training platform.
hero.titleSuffix: are not magic, they are engineering
hero.subtitle: Only by understanding the mechanisms can you master the tools. From absolute beginner to enterprise practice, systematically master mainstream AI coding tools such as Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code, and more.
enrollment.title: Start your AI coding journey
enrollment.subtitle: Start with real learning progress first, and master AI coding tools at your own pace
enrollment.localProgress: Progress saved locally in the browser
enrollment.currentInfo: Model and tool information continuously updated
enrollment.coverage: Covers individual, team, and project practices
enrollment.authorizedFeedback: Only authorized real feedback is shown
contact.heading: Send me your feedback
contact.description: You can tell me what was hard to understand, which cases you want added, or where your learning is currently stuck. I will prioritize content adjustments based on real feedback.
